HEADQUARTERS

Headquarters: Seishinkan Okubo Dojo

[A karate dojo facing Tohoku-dori, on the border between Shiroishi-ku and Toyohira-ku]
The Headquarters Dojo got its start in March 1986 (Showa 61), when a permanent dojo was established in Shiroishi-ku.
Continuing karate activities for half a century since the days of the former Sapporo Branch, it is one of Sapporo's most established karate dojos.
It moved to its current location in 2012 (Heisei 24); with a parking lot and a total floor area of 200 tsubo across the main and annex buildings, it is the largest permanent dojo in Hokkaido.
Members range from 3 to 82 years old, all enjoying a good workout together. The Headquarters Dojo offers a Junior Class for elementary and junior high school students (Mon/Wed), a General Division for high school students and up (Wed/Sat), a Kids Class for preschoolers and early elementary students (Thu), a Women's Class (Fri), a Junior & Parent-Child Class (Sat), a daytime class for housewives and seniors (Mon/Wed), and an Iaido Division (Sun).
※We have also newly established a special class for students who are not attending school.

※For details on the days and times of each class, please see the List of Karate Classes in Shiroishi-ku.

History

Access

2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along Tohoku-dori)
Dedicated parking available - main building 100 tatami mats, annex 60 tatami mats
About 9 min (750m) on foot from Shiroishi Subway Station, about 18 min (1.4km) on foot from Tsukisamu-chuo Subway Station
About 4 min on foot from the Chuo Bus "Sakaedori 1-chome" stop

The parking lot is behind the Headquarters Dojo, behind the annex building (at the very back). During the winter, due to snow, vehicles are parked close together.
How to Park During Winter (PDF)　How to Park April-November (PDF)

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
